reviews.review_description:
This game is meant to trick you into thinking you are going to have a fun climbing experience, but in reality your not, an animal, cant climb, and there isnt even a mountain you can only walk slowly and jump in a small room. I want a refund
-10/10

The idea of climbing a mountain as an animal in VR is really fun and creative. I like the concept and the cute style of the animals. During my play session I ran into an issue around the third ledge that stopped me from progressing, so I wasn’t able to continue the climb or see the rest of the game yet. If that issue gets fixed, I think the game could be a fun challenge for players who enjoy climbing style VR games.

Not sure if maybe they updated it since the reviews but i checked it out and really enjoyed it. Its a basic climbing game but works well and you play as a monkey (you can also scream like one in game) and climbing is smooth. Fun game.

The actual game does not resemble the cover photo. There are no animals or any details remotely similar to the promised cover photo or name of game. The graphics are very primitive and gameplay is extremely slow and choppy. It feels like an unfinished game. 
I am asking for a refund immediately.

I suspect the name and cover chosen for this game was done to mislead those who know the popular "peak" game on steam that does include animal avatars and actual fun gameplay.
I bought this game thinking it was the same one I see online only for it to be a scam and an unplayable game this sucks
So i thought this was the game peak on steam but its on pc not vr and i got scammed into this game and its not enen FUN
you do nothing and i just reported the owner right now
This game as potential to be one of the best VR climbing games on meta store!
This game sucks you cant even climb

reviews.review_title: I wish I could give it a higher rating
reviews.review_description: So far, the game doesn't allow the player to actually reach the top of the climb. For some reason the checkpoint system is bugged and it teleports the player lower instead of higher. Im sure they'll fix it but so far it doesn't have a proper ending. Climbing feels smooth. Waiting for a fix! I would give it 3.5★

The simple climbing is neat, and I like the music as well. But I'd like there to be little color changes as you climb the mountain to show that I'm getting further up, because sometimes it feels like I'm stuck in the same segment. With some extra work, I think this game can turn out a lot better. It shows potential

Interesting idea for a VR climbing game and the basic grabbing mechanic works. The experience feels simple right now, but it shows potential if more features and variety are added in future updates. Definitely a project that has room to grow
